mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_schedule_result(employee_id, deptment_id, schedule_date, shift_type, regist_quota, is_generated, is_modified, source_type) VALUES
(#{item.employeeId}, #{item.deptmentId}, #{item.scheduleDate}, #{item.shiftType}, #{item.registQuota}, #{item.isGenerated}, #{item.isModified}, #{item.sourceType})
